allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "Home OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Home FAIL: $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333/movie" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "Movie OK: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Movie FAIL: $_" }; try { $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333/rankers" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "Rankers OK: $\($r3.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Rankers FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "Home OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Home FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 12; "Home OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $gold = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'text-yellow|gold|#c9a8|fdf6e3'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; if \($gold.Count -gt 0\) { "Gold remnants: $\($gold -join ', '\)" } else { "No gold found" } } catch { "Home FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($pages = @\('/', '/courses', '/faculty', '/gallery', '/movie', '/branches', '/about', '/contact', '/rankers'\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $gold = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'text-yellow|gold|var\\\(--gold\\\)|fdf6e3|#c9a8'\).Count; "$p : Status $\($r.StatusCode\) | Gold hits: $gold" } catch { "$p : FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
